title: ts#dcr-proxy
description: Generate an OAuth Dynamic Client Registration (DCR) proxy construct for Cognito-authenticated MCP servers

name.description: The name of your DCR proxy, used for the construct class name and its directory under common/constructs (default: dcr-proxy)
name.x-prompt: What would you like to call your DCR proxy? (default: dcr-proxy)

iac.description: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection. Only cdk is supported.
iac.x-prompt: Which provider would you like to manage your infrastructure? (default: inherit)

preferInstallDependencies.description: Whether to prefer installing dependencies after the generator runs. Set to false to defer installing when batching multiple generators (an install still runs if needed so subsequent generators can compute the Nx project graph); install once at the end.
